# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Derive version from tag
        id: version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          if [[ ! "$TAG" =~ ^v[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+){2}([.-][0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$ ]]; then
            echo "Tag must look like vX.Y.Z (optionally with pre-release suffix). Got: $TAG" >&2
            exit 1
          fi
          VERSION="${TAG#v}"
          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install Node deps
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build (Node)
        run: |
          if npm run | grep -qE ' build'; then
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No npm build script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install Python build tooling
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install --upgrade build twine

      - name: Build (Python)
        run: |
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            python -m build
          else
            echo "No pyproject.toml found; skipping Python build."
          fi

      - name: Upload artifacts (dist/)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('dist/**') != '' }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload artifacts (npm package tarballs)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('*.tgz') != '' }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-tarballs
          path: "*.tgz"
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download dist artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const tag = process.env.GITHUB_REF_NAME;
            const { data } = await github.rest.repos.generateReleaseNotes({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              tag_name: tag,
            });
            core.setOutput('body', data.body || '');

      - name: Create GitHub Release (with assets)
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}
          body: ${{ steps.notes.outputs.body }}
          generate_release_notes: false
          prerelease: ${{ contains(needs.build.outputs.version, '-') }}
          files: |
            dist/**
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  publish_npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN != '' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org/
          cache: npm

      - name: Install Node deps
        run: npm ci

      - name: Sync package version to tag (no git changes)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm version "$VERSION" --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version
          else
            echo "No package.json found; skipping npm publish."
          fi

      - name: Build (optional)
        run: |
          if npm run | grep -qE ' build'; then
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No npm build script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Publish
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
            exit 0
          fi
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          if [[ "$VERSION" == *"-"* ]]; then
            npm publish --access public --tag next
          else
            npm publish --access public
          fi

  publish_pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN != '' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install build tooling
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install --upgrade build twine

      - name: Build sdist/wheel
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            rm -rf dist
            python -m build
          else
            echo "No pyproject.toml found; skipping PyPI publish."
          fi

      - name: Upload to PyPI
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            python -m twine upload --non-interactive dist/*
          fi
